scenarios.title: Scenario1_SampleBackgroundTask
scenarios.description: Registers a background task for the Time Zone Change system event. The background task runs whenever the Time Zone changes.

controls.inner_text: Registers a background task for the Time Zone Change system event. The background task runs whenever the Time Zone changes.

scenarios.title: Scenario2_SampleBackgroundTaskWithCondition
scenarios.description: Registers a background task for the Time Zone Change system event and the Internet Available system condition. The background task runs whenever the Time Zone changes if there is an available internet connection. The task will be canceled if the internet connection is disconnected while the background task is running.

scenarios.title: Scenario3_ServicingCompleteTask
scenarios.description: Registers a background task for the Servicing Complete event. The background task runs when the application is updated with a newer version.

controls.inner_text: Registers a background task for the Servicing Complete event. The background task runs when the application is updated with a newer version.

scenarios.title: Scenario4_TimeTriggeredTask
scenarios.description: Registers a background task for a time trigger event. The background task runs every 15 mins.

controls.inner_text: Registers a background task for a time trigger event. The background task runs every 15 mins.

scenarios.title: Scenario5_ApplicationTriggerTask
scenarios.description: Registers a background task for an application trigger event, requests background access and then signals the event.

controls.inner_text: Registers a background task for an application trigger event, requests background access and then signals the event.

scenarios.title: Scenario6_GroupedTask
scenarios.description: Registers a background task for a Time zone change trigger event with a background task registration group. Registering with a group enables the task registration to remain active when all ungrouped tasks are unregistered.
